creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
It seems that softweyr.com doesn't accept anonymous ftp login anymore,
nor does ftp.softweyr.com.

The source file also doesn't seem to exist on ftp.freebsd.org.

Fix: 

fetch and use the precompiled package instead.
How-To-Repeat: 
	

make fetch in /usr/ports/security/liedentd:

# make fetch
